theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

narrative.summary: Micron: 정량 종합 66점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 53 / 중기 68 / 장기 72. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 과열
overheat.guidance: 조정(10~15% 하락) 기다리는 게 안전. 지금은 관망.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 8.9% → 2-ATR 손절폭 17.9%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 일봉 50MA, Anchored VWAP (저점 기준). 현재가 대비 +31.0% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $677.4 아래 손절가 $545.6 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Knicks' Team Sacrifices and Success Inspire New York Optimism
top_news.summary: Bill Bradley, former US Senator and two-time NBA champion, discussed the New York Knicks' recent success, highlighting how Jalen Brunson gave up millions in free agency to allow the team more financial flexibility to build a stronger roster. He emphasized that this special group's dedication and shared beliefs have led to their success, which resonates positively with New Yorkers. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: What to Know About SpaceX’s Record-Breaking IPO
top_news.summary: SpaceX had the largest stock-market debut in history when it went public on June 12. The company raised $75 billion in the initial public offering and ended its first day on the public markets with a market capitalization of around $2.2 trillion. The IPO turned SpaceX founder Elon Musk into the world’s first trillionaire.

top_news.title: SpaceX IPO Sparks Surge in Space Industry Investment and Market Optimism
top_news.summary: Heather Pringle, CEO of the Space Foundation, discussed the impact of SpaceX's historic $75 Billion IPO on the broader space industry and investment landscape. She highlighted that SpaceX's public listing marks a significant milestone for a maturing space sector, demonstrating viable pathways to profitability through communications, launch services, and navigation technologies. she speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Bloomberg Money 6/12/2026
top_news.summary: Bloomberg Money takes the pulse of your financial life, powered by the reporting of our global newsroom. Chanos & Company President & Founder Jim Chanos and Former US Treasury Secretary and Columbia University Professor of International & Public Affairs Jacob Lew. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Look Ahead: Retail Sales, FMOC, NBA Finals
top_news.summary: Bloomberg's Lisa Mateo joins Scarlet Fu and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Knicks Win Triggered Record Loss for Susquehanna Sports Traders
top_news.summary: Jeff Yass, the founder of the Wall Street trading firm Susquehanna International Group, has long been a New York Knicks fan. But he couldn’t fully savor the moment when the team completed its epic comeback to win game four of the NBA finals.

top_news.title: Space Stocks Tumble as Investors Race Toward Musk’s IPO
top_news.summary: SpaceX’s long-awaited initial public offering triggered a selloff Friday in the shares of other rocket, satellite and space-related companies.

top_news.title: SpaceX, Tesla Merger A 'Forgone Conclusion,' Says Ross Gerber
top_news.summary: Ross Gerber, president and CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management, said that he feels a that a merger to combine SpaceX and Tesla is a 'forgone conclusion' and that he believes its been propping up Tesla's stock as people wait for an opportunity to own SpaceX.  Gerber says that despite some concerns about Musk's complete control over both companies, he feels that investors know what they are getting into putting their money in his hands and that investors who have a problem with i

top_news.title: All Eyes on SpaceX | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: From London to Sydney, Traders Ready to Watch SpaceX’s Debut
top_news.summary: Investors and retail traders from across the US and around the world were glued to their screens on Friday as Elon Musk’s SpaceX started trading in the stock market after the biggest initial public offering in Wall Street history.
